node.excerpt: There’s a moment every Street Fighter 6 player knows. You’ve just lost the same matchup for the fifth time in a row. The rematch prompt is…

frontmatter.title: Fighting games teach you about grit — what Street Fighter 6 keeps beating into me
frontmatter.description: Nobody watches you lose forty times at the gym. In Street Fighter 6, losing is public, immediate, and entirely your fault — and that's exactly why the ranked grind is one of the best grit trainers I know.
